dialogues: Equal groups aren't just in math problems. Here's a real situation.
Can you build what the shelf looks like?
How many in each pack? Add the juice boxes.
That's it. 4 packs, 6 in each. Equal groups, right there on a store shelf.
4 groups of 6. That's 4 × 6. Any time you see the same number in each container, packs, bags, boxes, cartons, that's equal groups. It's multiplication, even outside math class.
